# Security Model

The MVP security model is conservative and local.

## Paths

Manifest paths must be relative to the core directory. Absolute paths, platform
prefixes, and `..` traversal are rejected before backend commands are built.

## Commands

External tools are launched with `std::process::Command` using:

- program name;
- argv array;
- optional working directory.

No command is executed through a shell string. Reports store the exact program
and args used.

## Generated Files

Generated artifacts are written under the selected `--build-root` unless the
command explicitly targets a path, such as CI generation. Generated files are
marked with `Generated by AccelFury IP Toolchain`.

## Non-Goals

The MVP does not sandbox Verilator or FuseSoC. It assumes local developer/CI
trust for installed EDA tools.
